allow: Bash(sqlite3 hybrid_trades.db -csv -header "SELECT id, condition_id, asset, duration, direction, entry_price, size_usdc, pnl, status, mode, created_at FROM trades ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 150;")
Bash(python3 -c "import py_clob_client; print\(py_clob_client.__version__ if hasattr\(py_clob_client, '__version__'\) else 'no version attr'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "from py_clob_client.client import ClobClient; from py_clob_client.clob_types import BalanceAllowanceParams, AssetType; print\('imports OK'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "from py_clob_client.clob_types import PartialCreateOrderOptions; import inspect; print\(inspect.signature\(PartialCreateOrderOptions\)\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "from py_clob_client_v2.client import ClobClient; print\('OK v2'\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "from execution.executor import Executor; print\('executor OK'\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "from feeds.markets import MarketDiscovery; print\('markets OK'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(m['question'], '|', m.get\('slug', 'N/A'\)\) for m in data if 'HYPE' in m.get\('question', ''\) or 'HYPE' in m.get\('slug', ''\) or 'HLP' in m.get\('slug', ''\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(m['question']\) for m in data if 'up' in m.get\('question', ''\).lower\(\) and \('5' in m.get\('question', ''\) or '5-min' in m.get\('question', ''\).lower\(\)\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); uniq_words = set\(\); [uniq_words.update\(m.get\('question', ''\).split\(\)\) for m in data]; print\('\\n'.join\(sorted\([w for w in uniq_words if w.isupper\(\) and len\(w\) <= 5]\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); crypto = [m for m in data if any\(x in m.get\('question', ''\).lower\(\) for x in ['bitcoin', 'btc', 'ethereum', 'eth', 'solana', 'sol', 'crypto', 'price', '5-min', '5 min', 'updown']\)]; print\(f'Found {len\(crypto\)} crypto-related markets'\); [print\(m.get\('question', ''\), '---', m.get\('slug', ''\)\) for m in crypto[:10]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total markets: {len\(data\)}'\); tags = set\(\); [tags.update\(m.get\('tags', []\)\) for m in data if 'tags' in m]; print\(f'Unique tags: {sorted\(tags\)[:20]}'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); crypto = [m for m in data if 'price' in m.get\('question', ''\).lower\(\) and any\(x in m.get\('question', ''\).lower\(\) for x in ['up', 'down', 'minute']\)]; print\(f'Price direction markets: {len\(crypto\)}'\); [print\(m.get\('question', ''\)\) for m in crypto[:15]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total: {len\(data\)}'\); [print\(f\\"{m.get\('slug', 'N/A'\)}\\"\) for m in data if 'updown' in m.get\('slug', ''\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['filename'], '+', f.get\('additions',0\), '-', f.get\('deletions',0\)\) for f in d.get\('files',[]\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/cmp.json'\)\); [print\(f['filename'], '+', f.get\('additions',0\), '-', f.get\('deletions',0\)\) for f in d.get\('files',[]\)]")
